programmes.show_description: ...the World: In March 2011, a massive tsunami caused a major meltdown at Japan's Fukushima nuclear plant, triggering explosions and evacuations. What went wrong at Fukushima? (Ep2)

programmes.show_name: Super Surgeons: A Chance at Life
programmes.show_description: Ex-navy pilot Rich has a huge 16cm tumour running from his jaw to his heart. Meanwhile, nearly all the organs in Tracy's pelvis need removal to combat her stage four bowel cancer.
A man has broken his leg on Scafell Pike. As darkness closes in, can the mountain rescue team save him from potentially life-threatening plummeting temperatures? (Ep2/4)
On the Gogglebox: Britain's Got Talent, The Heat, 56 Days, Olivia Attwood: Getting Filthy Rich, Ed Stafford's Rite of Passage, and Alice Roberts: Our Hospital Through Time.
This time it's Corrie, The Stolen Girl, The Piano, Mickey Rourke on Celebrity Big Brother, savoury cocktails on Saturday Kitchen, the News on Katy Perry in space, and more.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Ford Escort RS2000: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend visit Dorset to fix up a Mk2 RS2000. It belongs to carpenter Mike, who gave up work to support his son who had a terrible accident.
KISS and Sell: Will expert buyers Mike Wolfe and Frank Fritz want to rock and roll all night when they find masses of KISS merch in Nicky's barn? Plus: Mike goes for a test drive!
In Bradford, Tom draws on his French heritage to deliver simple dishes executed well. And as the final scores are revealed, who has that je ne sais quoi? (Ep5/5)
It's payment day following a wonderful week in Wales. The problem is, none of the B&Bers can agree on what exactly was wonderful about it.

programmes.show_name: A New Life in the Sun
programmes.show_description: Gill and Robin complete their Tuscan hillside retreat. Stretch and Rachael take on a busy summer season. And did David and Lane make the right move?
Geraldine and Tim are looking for a spacious holiday home that their whole family can enjoy on Spain's glorious Costa Tropical. Sara Damergi shows them what £180k can buy.
Lucy Alexander helps Tracy and Lee find a French holiday home in Lower Normandy, which they hope could one day become their permanent home, for their budget of £70k.
Crewe and Nantwich. Hairdresser Mushgon Dadfar serves up Caribbean cuisine. But how will her Zumba entertainment go down after a heavy meal? (Ep1/5)
Crewe and Nantwich. After years of practice as a host, Pip Massey has high expectations for her 'glamorous' evening. (Ep2/5)
Crewe and Nantwich. Landscape gardener and joker Darren's evening features fine food and lashings of his unique entertainment, including big laughs at Darren's bottom. (Ep3/5)
Crewe and Nantwich. Student Emma Davies serves up her inventive stuffed pork, home-made gnocchi and a musical performance. (Ep4/5)
Crewe and Nantwich. The week of dining is rounded off with hypnotherapist Russell Stubbs' 'British rock night'. Will Russell's great British produce win him the prize? (Ep5/5)
Maria and Andy love Cyprus. They met on the island 20 years ago, got married there, and are now planning to move there. Jean Johansson shows them what their £140k can buy in Famagusta.
...Ceremony - Signed and AD: Ade Adepitan, Ed Jackson, Dame Sarah Storey and Alice Tai present live from the opening ceremony of the Milano Cortina Winter Paralympics.
Andrew's sustained a severe facial injury in an accident at work. Tony's been crushed by a forklift truck. And in resus, 61-year-old John keeps having sudden blackouts. But why?
Brighton's night police patrol the town's hectic night life - from a possible suicide up on the cliff, to an urgent manhunt for a violent assailant with a crowbar.
This time the Goggleboxers watch The Apprentice, Britain's Got Talent, Handcuffed: Last Pair Standing, Love Is Blind, Celebrity Puzzling, and Alexander Armstrong in India.
This time it's Corrie, The Stolen Girl, The Piano, Mickey Rourke on Celebrity Big Brother, savoury cocktails on Saturday Kitchen, the News on Katy Perry in space, and more.
Could you survive being handcuffed to a total stranger 24/7? Jonathan Ross challenges 18 brave Brits to stay together, as they compete to win a £100k prize. (Ep1)
Could you stay handcuffed to a stranger 24/7? Self-confessed prude Charlie is hooked to heavily tattooed Rob. Can Christian hairdresser Nina handle Sara's chatty nature? (Ep2)
Retired artists Carole and Roger have crammed their nine-bed home with objects from around the world. Will they part with possessions to raise much-needed cash? (Ep2/3)
Desiree Burch joins Joe Lycett for some snow-filled shenanigans in Lapland, where they have a crack at ice fishing and get carried away on a sleigh ride.
Kirstie Allsopp shows us how to create beautiful crafts with items we already own. She transforms some fabric by dyeing it with turmeric, and embellishes an old lampshade.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Cambridge area. The first host, kennel and cattery owner Dean Faulkner, is keen to impress with his cockney-themed evening. (Ep1/5)
Kay Greenwood plans a menu of retro classics in Cambridge. But will her blindfolded taste test entertainment prove hard to swallow? (Ep2/5)
In Cambridge, marketing consultant Matt hopes to deliver the whole package, with a home-grown menu and some outdoor fun and games. And things get competitive at the coconut shy. (Ep3/5)
Cambridge area. Hawa Sydique hosts with an adventurous menu, a funky dress code - and a samba band in her front room. (Ep4/5)
On the final night in Cambridge, Scouser David Goodier hopes to show his southern rivals how to throw a winning dinner party, with a 1960s Merseybeat theme. (Ep5/5)
In South Wales, farm girl Claire treats her guests to a traditional, hearty Welsh spread and farm-themed games. Will her farm charm impress? Or will her night end up a mucky mess? (Ep1/5)
In South Wales, Richard hosts at his pub, setting the bar high with terrific tartlets, sensational sea bass and crowd-pleasing cheesecake. Can he hit the bullseye? (Ep2/5)
In South Wales, Daffyd plans a nutritious vegetarian-ish dinner party, but kitchen chaos ensues. Will his dud pud ruin his chances of winning the grand? (Ep3/5)
The fourth host in South Wales, doctor Sophie, is usually vegan but is serving meat to try and win over her guests. Will it be just what the doctor ordered? (Ep4/5)
In South Wales, the week's final host Sandra goes heavy on cream and mushrooms, even though none of her guests really like them! But is her night the crème de la crème? (Ep5/5)

programmes.show_name: A Place in the Sun: What...
programmes.show_description: ...Happened Next?: Lee Juggurnauth visits Eleanor and Chris at their Tenerife flat. Danni Menzies sees if Peter and Karen are living the off-grid life they craved in Tarragona.
Geraldine and Tim are looking for a spacious holiday home that their whole family can enjoy on Spain's glorious Costa Tropical. Sara Damergi shows them what £180k can buy.
Laura Hamilton helps sisters Sheila and Jean to look for a holiday home on Spain's Mijas Costa for all their family and friends to enjoy, for £120k. Will they find their dream place?
It's full steam ahead for train driver Wayne and train manager Kate, as Lee Juggurnauth shows them what their £85k budget can buy in Pinar de Campoverde in Spain.
Antonia and Ross love Ibiza. They've holidayed there many times, and now hope to find their own holiday home there. Can Lucy Alexander deliver their dream?
Leah Charles-King helps Sarah and Andy find the 'pawfect' place for their whole family - including their beloved dog Ruby - on Spain's southern Costa Blanca, for their budget of £160k.
In the South East, Kirstie Allsopp helps Tom and Kaitlyn, whose wish list is bigger than their budget. Phil Spencer's with Pete and Georgie, who are desperate for more space.

programmes.show_name: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or...
programmes.show_description: ...List It: Sue and Richard's beautiful home in Mapperley is no longer suitable since Richard had a cycling accident. Can Kirstie make it accessible? Or should they list it?
(2017) Fantasy adventure starring Matt Damon and Willem Dafoe. In 11th-century China, Europeans seeking the secret of gunpowder are caught up in a war against alien monsters.
